contract_elements_covered: Q1: extract category_id from first split; upsert_transaction bind
Q2: ISO-8601/RFC3339 datetime → NaiveDate date component only
Q3: signed amount from split type per DEC-0059 (withdrawal/deposit/transfer)
R1: total_transaction_count, total_outflow, total_inflow, uncategorized_transaction_count, period_status
R1: NULL category_id → category_name Uncategorized in service layer
R1: allow_raw_transactions=false — summary fields present; raw_rows absent (DEC-0032)
P1: deploy → manual Firefly sync backfill ~922 rows → AI Chat + SQL probe on financegnome.omniflow.cc
frozen_boundaries_respected: No PrivacyLayer change — aggregate-only new fields
No SQL migration backfill — DEC-0002 upsert on next sync only
Do not rewrite aggregate SQL to read unsigned amounts from payload
Do not change allow_raw_transactions default or expose raw rows for fix

dependency_review.notes: Ingest chain Q1→Q2→Q3 must precede R1 aggregates; P1 gated on deploy + operator sync backfill before omniflow smoke

coverage.criterion: Firefly sync persists category_id on mirror transactions rows used by aggregates_by_category; period filter returns rows with non-NULL dates and signed amounts for outflow sums
coverage.notes: Three ingest gaps from discovery/backlog (NULL category_id, ISO date parse failure, positive amounts vs amount<0 outflow) each have dedicated ordered tasks; re-sync upsert backfill via DEC-0002 documented in Q3

coverage.criterion: get_transactions aggregate JSON includes explicit period transaction totals/counts and distinguishes empty period vs uncategorized/zero-outflow under allow_raw_transactions=false; privacy redaction and six-tool registry preserved
coverage.notes: R1 adds all architecture-frozen fields and period_status priority chain; privacy unit test + frozen boundary DEC-0032; six-tool registry via regression footer at verify-work (ADV-1)

coverage.criterion: After Firefly sync with 922+ transactions on US-0010 external profile, AI Chat answers category/spending questions using get_transactions data — not no-expenses/unavailable when mirror rows exist
coverage.notes: P1 operator verify after Q1–R1 deploy + manual sync; downstream of ingest + aggregate fixes; SQL probe cross-checks tool totals

coverage.criterion: Privacy redaction and six-tool registry constraints preserved; OIDC-enabled deploy regression checks pass (acceptance footer)
coverage.notes: uat.md regression row post-P1; R1 privacy test covers raw_rows gate; full OIDC/six-tool smoke at verify-work — not separate dev task (ADV-1)

advisories.note: Acceptance regression footer (OIDC + six-tool registry + privacy) has no dedicated dev task; operator verify-work smoke post-P1 — not a plan-verify blocker.
Row P runtime proof requires operator manual Firefly sync after deploy to backfill ~922 existing rows — P1 blocked until sync completes per DEC-0002 upsert path.
First-split-only category model may miss transfer destination-leg category — acceptable MVP per architecture; full journal retained in payload.
BUG-0002/0003 verify-work BLOCKED on parallel tracks — Q0010 frozen boundary forbids merge; independent deploy/verify.
Six-tool registry count not explicitly asserted in task tests — verify-work should confirm get_transactions remains registered alongside five other tools.

notes: QA plan-verify 2026-06-05: sprints/quick/Q0010/tasks.md aligns with docs/product/acceptance.md BUG-0006 rows P/Q/R and architecture § BUG-0006; 5/5 tasks mapped (Q1,Q2,Q3,R1,P1); discovery sub-defects P/Q/Q2/Q3/R covered; no gaps or orphans. Approved for /execute.
